creator: mbeis@xs4all.nl
text:
The man page relocation of lxqt on jan 16th has caused an install problem of pcmanfm-qt:

===>   Registering installation for pcmanfm-qt-0.14.1
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/x11-fm/pcmanfm-qt/work/stage/usr/local/man/man1/pcmanfm-qt.1.gz:No such file or directory
*** Error code 74
